title: astragalus gracaninii
intro: Astragalus gracaninii, also known as the Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus gracaninii include reducing stress and fatigue, boosting the immune system, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus gracaninii is often prepared as a tea or capsule, and it may also be combined with other herbs in formulas to enhance its medicinal effects.
